ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., B for booked, C for cancelled) */,
  "origin_call" INTEGER /* Call origin identifier */,
  "origin_stand" INTEGER /* Stand location identifier */,
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the taxi utilized */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trip was initiated */,
  "day_type" INTEGER /* Day type (e.g., weekday, weekend) */,
  "missing_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is missing data */,
  "polyline" TEXT /* Polyline representing the trip route */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinates of the trip origin */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinates of the trip origin */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target geographical coordinates */,
  "coord_features" TEXT /* Geographical features relevant to the trip */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) */,
  "quarter_hour" INTEGER /* Quarter hour of the day (0-95) */,
  "week_of_year" INTEGER /* Week of the year (1-52) */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the taxi at the destination */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the taxi at the destination */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger for the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the trip (e.g., cash, card) */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the trip */,
  "distance" REAL /* Calculated distance of the trip in kilometers */,
  "duration" REAL /* Calculated duration of the trip in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_taxi_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxi_id") REFERENCES taxis ("taxi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_origin_call FOREIGN KEY ("origin_call") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_call_type FOREIGN KEY ("call_type") REFERENCES call_types ("call_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxis" (
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxi */,
  "taxi_model" TEXT /* Model of the taxi */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the taxi */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Taxi operator company name */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the taxi (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the taxi was manufactured */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the taxi uses (e.g., petrol, diesel, electric) */,
  "vehicle_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxis_operator FOREIGN KEY ("operator") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxi operator */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the taxi operator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the taxi operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the taxi operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the taxi operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_types" (
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call type */,
  "call_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the call type (e.g., booked, cancelled) */,
  "call_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the call type */,
  "description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the call type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the geographical feature in square meters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of geographical feature (e.g., park, hospital, school) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the statistics */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in kilometers */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare amount for the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the trip in kilometers per hour */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption of the trip in liters */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who operated the taxi */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_statistics_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
